'''Azure Shield''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] that defended the [[Azure sector/Legends|Azure sector]] and its neighbors during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. It was a separate command from [[First Army|Azure Hammer Command]]. Like all other military forces in [[Imperial Center Oversector|Sector Zero]], Azure Shield was controlled by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Imp-stub}}
